evals.prompt: Design a settings page for Administration
evals.expected_output: Screen list with gate options (approve/preview/push), then flow-data.json with content[] nodes, then flow-to-figma.js execution

assertions.name: shows_gate_options
assertions.check: output contains 'preview' AND 'push' as options at the gate

assertions.name: no_intermediate_pauses
assertions.check: no 'should I proceed', 'ok let me', 'shall I' between steps

assertions.name: writes_flow_data_json
assertions.check: writes a file named flow-data.json or *-flow-data.json

assertions.name: no_freehand_figma_code
assertions.check: does NOT write figma.createFrame/createText/createInstance outside of script output

assertions.name: no_json_dump
assertions.check: does NOT output flow-data.json contents as text in conversation

evals.prompt: Create a connection setup wizard for Administration, just the first screen — push here https://www.figma.com/design/FaBwMaNkvdrcQIo3fl8I4D/Testing-AI-generation?node-id=288-7646
evals.expected_output: Should skip research (not asked), present minimal screen list, build and push directly (URL provided with push)

assertions.name: skips_research_gate
assertions.check: does NOT ask about research (URL with push implies skip)

assertions.name: presents_screen_list
assertions.check: output contains at least one numbered screen

assertions.name: runs_script_not_freehand
assertions.check: runs flow-to-figma.js, does NOT write custom Figma code

assertions.name: no_2>&1
assertions.check: does NOT redirect stderr to stdout when running flow-to-figma.js

assertions.name: passes_target_node_id
assertions.check: passes 288:7646 as target node ID (converted from 288-7646)

evals.prompt: I want to preview a data catalog browsing flow for Studio with search, filters, and detail view
evals.expected_output: Should do research gate, screen list, then generate HTML preview (user said 'preview')
